summary: Executed targeted backend + frontend regression testing for exhibition workflow and community creation readiness on public preview URL. Build compiles, key routes load/redirect without crash, and unauth contracts for new exhibition/community APIs pass. Identified two critical code-level regressions likely causing reported community and artist exhibition failures when authenticated.

critical.issue: Route uses fields community.image/community.category/community.invite_criteria, but CommunityCreate model is redefined later without these fields. Authenticated execution can raise runtime AttributeError and fail community creation.

integration_issues.issue: ArtistExhibitionsPage calls artistAPI.getArtworks(), but api.js does not export getArtworks (only getPortfolio). Authenticated artist opening /dashboard/exhibitions is expected to fail data fetch/runtime flow.

action_items: Fix duplicate CommunityCreate model declaration in backend/server.py (merge fields needed by /api/community/create route).
Fix ArtistExhibitionsPage API call mismatch: replace artistAPI.getArtworks() with existing artistAPI.getPortfolio() mapping or add getArtworks alias in api.js.
After fixes, retest authenticated artist/admin flows for /dashboard/exhibitions and /admin/exhibitions including submit actions.
Optional hardening: add data-testid attributes to desktop exhibition dropdown trigger/links in NavBar for more robust automation coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py defines CommunityCreate twice; second definition overwrites first and drops fields used in create_community_managed.
frontend/src/pages/ArtistExhibitionsPage.js references artistAPI.getArtworks which is not defined in frontend/src/services/api.js.
ImageUpload projection + ratio/output-size options compile successfully in production build and include testids for projection controls.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (public route/navigation smoke passed; auth-gated exhibition workflows not fully executable without credentials)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use authenticated artist and admin accounts to reproduce and verify fixes: (1) artist /dashboard/exhibitions currently likely fails on getArtworks call, (2) community creation likely fails due to CommunityCreate model field mismatch at runtime. Current public URL auth redirects for protected routes are working.
rca of the issue: Community create RCA: duplicated Pydantic class name CommunityCreate caused field shadowing; route code still expects removed attributes, leading to runtime failure when authenticated requests hit /api/community/create. Artist exhibitions RCA: page invokes non-existent artistAPI.getArtworks(), causing integration failure for authenticated fetchData path.
